description_long: This helmet features a geometric, angular shell with a prominent triangular lattice pattern across its surface, giving it a modern and technical appearance. The main body is a warm brown color, with the lattice structure providing both visual interest and likely structural reinforcement. At the front, there is a dark, rounded face shield or visor area, accented with a maroon band and a vertical blue stripe, suggesting a protective and possibly high-tech function. The helmet appears to be open at the bottom and back, with the interior likely lined for comfort and fit. No visible ventilation openings or external attachments are present, and the overall design is streamlined and compact. The helmet's construction suggests it is intended for personal safety in urban environments, such as cycling or motorcycling.
description: A brown, angular helmet with a triangular lattice pattern and a dark, rounded face shield accented by maroon and blue details. The design is modern, compact, and visually technical.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dark face shield with maroon and blue accents, and the angular brown lattice sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and curvature of the brown lattice shell, with the face shield partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the two brown lattice panels and the back of the face shield, with the maroon and blue accents more visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other side of the brown lattice shell and the helmet's open bottom.
attribute_graphic_design: Geometric triangular lattice pattern on the shell with maroon and blue accent stripes on the visor area.
